business.name: Sunshine House Cleaning, LLC
business.tagline: Making homes sparkle, one room at a time

hero.headline: The house that *sparkles* when you walk in
hero.subheadline: From kitchen sinks to couch cushions — nothing gets missed

services_section.label: THE CLEAN
services_section.heading: Every corner, every surface
services_section.subheading: The thorough clean that makes your house feel like home again

services.title: Deep House Cleaning
services.description: Complete top-to-bottom cleaning including under cushions, behind appliances, and all the spots others skip.

services.title: Kitchen & Bathroom Detail
services.description: Sparkling sinks, spotless counters, and bathrooms that shine. We make the hardest-working rooms work harder.

services.title: Regular Maintenance
services.description: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly service to keep your home consistently fresh and welcoming.

services.title: Move-In/Move-Out Clean
services.description: Fresh start cleaning for new homes or getting your deposit back when you leave.

about.heading: Vanessa's team knows clean
about.body: We're the Bridgeport house cleaning crew that shows up with the right tools and the right attitude. One clean, and you'll understand why neighbors keep our number.

reviews.name: Lucas M.
reviews.text: Vanessa and her team are simply the best! They've been cleaning my home for over a year and I couldn't be happier.

reviews.name: Marcos F.
reviews.text: Great to walk into my house after Vanessa cleans. House smells great, kitchen sink sparkles, everything looks wonderful.

reviews.name: Bill T.
reviews.text: Complete and thorough cleaning from kitchen to bathrooms, even vacuuming under couch cushions. House becomes a 5 star hotel.

cta.heading: Ready for that sparkling clean feeling?
cta.body: Get your free quote and see why Bridgeport trusts Vanessa's team with their homes.
